entities.name: ETHREL

entities.description: A fungus that causes ergot in pearl millet

entities.description: The ability of the plant to produce seeds when pollinated

entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the flower cluster

entities.name: POLLEN GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen grains sprouting

entities.name: ERGOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infection by Claviceps

entities.name: LATE BOOTING STAGE
entities.description: A specific growth stage of the plant used for treatment application

entities.description: A specific growth stage of the plant used for treatment application
